behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted strings (TryGetJsonTypeInfo, EnqueueEvent, EventArgs, paramsReader, _eventRegistrations, 'no event type mapping was found', PendingEvent, JsonSerializer.Deserialize(ref) and file paths) are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the required signatures and behavioral changes but doesn't show diff/line-level code; agent still needs to wire it up.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on specific gold-chosen names like field name '_eventRegistrations' (test_event_registrations_field_usage forbids '_events'), variable 'paramsReader', and exact warning phrase 'no event type mapping was found' — although these are dictated in instruction, alternative correct refactorings using different names would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Most fail_to_pass tests are regex/substring checks on file contents (e.g., test_try_get_json_type_info_method_exists, test_enqueue_event_accepts_event_args, test_pending_event_struct_simplified); only the build/format tests execute code.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p test asserts a specific code change that a stub no-op cannot satisfy without the refactor.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the renamed field, new method, EnqueueEvent signature, PendingEvent struct, deserialization location, and warning validation as specified.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names, docstrings, and clear separation between pass_to_pass build/format tests and fail_to_pass behavioral tests.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code refactor, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Filenames, method names, and identifiers are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to modify, which is appropriate; no line-number leakage.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code-only refactoring task.
